ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., SVM, KNN, ADAB, RF, LGB, XGB, DT, LOGR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "library" TEXT /* Machine learning library used (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters (e.g., hyperparameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., image, text, numerical) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "evaluation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., accuracy, F1 score, mean squared error) */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model used for evaluation */,
  "dataset_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
